拍.origin: The hand radical 扌 swings beside 白 (white) — picture a hand flashing as it claps.

唯.origin: A mouth 口 next to a little bird 隹 — one tiny voice, the only one you hear.

设.origin: The speech radical 讠 means you plan and design something by talking it out first.

计.origin: Speech 讠 beside ten 十 — using words and numbers to count and plan.

sentence.en: Let's work out this problem together.

受.origin: Something 冖 passed from one hand 爫 down to another 又 — you receive a gift.

扩.origin: The hand 扌 reaches toward 广 (wide) — your hands push something to make it bigger.

sentence.en: We want to make the garden bigger.

怀.origin: The heart radical 忄 holds your feelings — what you carry warm against your chest.

sentence.en: The kitten sleeps in mother's arms.

精.origin: Rice 米 with 青 (green-fresh) — the very best, finest grain, the pure essence.

特.origin: An ox 牛 by a temple 寺 — a special, one-of-a-kind animal that stands out.

赢.origin: A character holding a shell 贝 (money) inside — gather your coins and you win!

止.origin: A picture of a foot — when the foot plants down firmly, you stop.

典.origin: Two hands 八 carefully holding up a precious book 冊 — a book of rules and wisdom.

sentence.en: I use a dictionary to look up new words.

珍.origin: The jade radical 王 marks something rare and precious — a treasure worth keeping.

穷.origin: A body squeezed under a cave 穴 using all its strength 力 — too poor to stretch out.

sentence.en: Long ago this village was very poor.

留.origin: Picture standing in a field 田, deciding to stay and remain a while longer.

sentence.en: Please stay and eat with us.

暗.origin: The sun 日 beside a sound 音 — when the sun hides, the world turns dark.

此.origin: A foot 止 stops right here, beside 匕 — this is the very spot you mean.

sentence.en: At this moment snow began to fall.

误.origin: The speech radical 讠 — saying the wrong words leads to a mistake.

性.origin: The heart 忄 plus 生 (life) — the inborn nature and feelings you are born with.

纲.origin: Thread 纟 beside 冈 — the strong main rope that holds a whole net together.

sentence.en: The teacher asked us to write an outline.

部.origin: The right-side 阝 marks a place — a section or department of something bigger.

译.origin: The speech radical 讠 — turning one set of words into another language.

sentence.en: She translated the story into English.

广.origin: A lean-to roof 厂 with a dot — a wide, open building that stretches far.

sentence.en: The grassland is wide and green.

附.origin: The place radical 阝 with 付 — something set down close beside, right nearby.

sentence.en: There is a bookstore near the school.

显.origin: The sun 日 shines on top — light makes everything clear and easy to see.

雕.origin: A bird 隹 beside 周 — carve carefully, as fine as a bird's tiny feathers.

复.origin: A person 亻 who walks the same path 夂 every day 日 — doing it over again.

制.origin: A knife 刂 cutting cloth 巾 to shape — making and producing something by hand.

基.origin: The earth radical 土 at the bottom — solid ground that forms a strong foundation.

sentence.en: Building a good foundation is important.

顶.origin: The head radical 页 — the very top, like the crown sitting on your head.

sentence.en: There is snow on the mountaintop.

嘴.origin: The mouth radical 口 tells you exactly what this is — your mouth and lips.

sentence.en: He opened his mouth wide and laughed.

唇.origin: The mouth radical 口 under 辰 — the soft edges of your mouth, your lips.

sentence.en: Lips get dry when it is cold.

严.origin: Think of a stern face under a firm roof 厂 — strict and serious, no joking.

sentence.en: The teacher is very strict with us.

随.origin: Walk 辶 to the city 阝 — follow along the path wherever it leads.

加.origin: Strength 力 plus a mouth 口 — adding your words and power to make more.

呀.origin: A mouth 口 beside 牙 (tooth) — the little sound you make when surprised: ah!

匹.origin: Picture a roll of folded cloth tucked inside its wrapper — one bolt of fabric.

sentence.en: There is a horse on the grass.

瓷.origin: The tile-pottery radical 瓦 at the bottom — clay baked hard and smooth into china.

sentence.en: This porcelain bowl is very pretty.

众.origin: Three people 人 stacked together — many people make a crowd.

令.origin: A person kneeling below a leader — receiving an order or command from above.
